narrative:
Waynesville Village B (precinct in Warren County) has 1,026 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points.
